name: LiterallyGoogle
author: SoPat712
description: A Google-like theme with a sticky header and full-width plugin slots.

settingsSchema.label: Engine Performance (mobile)
settingsSchema.description: Default open/closed state for the Engine Performance sidebar panel on the Web tab (narrow screens).
optionLabels: Open during search, then collapse when complete

settingsSchema.label: Engine Performance (desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Default open/closed state for the Engine Performance sidebar panel on the Web tab (laptop and desktop).
optionLabels: Open during search, then collapse when complete

settingsSchema.label: Engine Performance (images tab, mobile)
settingsSchema.description: Default open/closed state for Engine Performance in the image search filters rail on narrow screens.
optionLabels: Open during search, then collapse when complete

settingsSchema.label: Engine Performance (images tab, desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Default open/closed state for Engine Performance in the image search filters rail on laptop and desktop.
optionLabels: Open during search, then collapse when complete

settingsSchema.label: People also search for (mobile)
settingsSchema.description: Default open or collapsed state for the related searches sidebar panel on narrow screens.

settingsSchema.label: People also search for (desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Default open or collapsed state for the related searches sidebar panel on laptop and desktop.

settingsSchema.label: Image mode layout (desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Choose which side the floating Tools button uses relative to the preview panel on laptop and desktop image search.

settingsSchema.label: Images FAB side (mobile)
settingsSchema.description: Choose which side the floating Tools button uses on narrow screens. Auto uses the page language and direction, defaulting to the right for English-style layouts and the left for Hebrew/Japanese.

settingsSchema.label: Knowledge panel (mobile)
settingsSchema.description: Default open or collapsed state for Wikipedia and knowledge plugin panels in the sidebar.

settingsSchema.label: Knowledge panel (desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Default open or collapsed state for Wikipedia and knowledge plugin panels in the sidebar.
